subcodes.title: Tafsiri-i-Hadith-i-‘Allamani Akhi Rasulu’llah
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, the God of all who are in heaven and on earth, Who hath decreed that no one should be veiled from the effulgence
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی الهم من فی السموات و الارض حکمه لئلا یحتجب احد عن ظهور نور طلعته
subcodes.subjects: @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @station of the Manifestation of God
